Gwinville Compressor Station Outage -- COMPLETE


Notice Text:

Southeast Supply Header has completed the previously posted outage at its Gwinville Compressor Station ahead of schedule and the station has returned to normal operations.

Effective immediately, all restrictions associated with this outage have been lifted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
